honesty: Desensitized reconstructions from published SOFL/interlocking/Agile-SOFL sources; NOT proprietary vendor dumps.
interpretation: On this published-industrial desensitized pilot, all modes saturate mean Conf under ecnu-plus. Supports C4: prefer B2 by default for mean Conf; escalate to full M only when Accept=1 or FAR<=5% is required. Does not falsify E6 (typed IR under repair headroom on hard synthetic).
